creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Nikola If you could set the maintainer-approval flag (to +) on attachments for ports you maintainer to signify maintainer approval, that would be great. 

maintainer-feedback + is not related to patch/maintainer approval, and is only required if set to ? first

Also, if there is an upstream changelog URL for this version, please include it in the URL field

Thanks!
